mutants.replacement:
Object.entries(envObj).filter(([, value]) => typeof value === "string").map(([key, value]) => ({
  key,
  value: value as string,
  scope,
  source: "settings.json",
  filePath: ""
}))

tests.name: configAggregator properties agents output length equals agents input length (per-file parsing, no filtering)
configAggregator properties commands output length equals commands input length
configAggregator properties read errors are passed through unchanged
configAggregator properties null settings produces empty hooks, mcpServers, rules, plugins, envVars
configAggregator properties envVars from settings receive filePath annotation from FileEntry.path
configAggregator properties agent scope is preserved from FileEntry, not hardcoded
configAggregator properties docs output length equals claudeMdFiles input length with scope preserved
User views hook bindings to verify configuration parses settings into structured hook definitions with event, command, and matchers
Hook with no matchers displays no matcher indication returns empty matchers array for hooks without matcher patterns
MCP server parsed with connection details and environment extracts name, type, command, args, and env vars from server config
MCP server with missing command field shows warning includes a warning about the missing required field
Rules extracted from settings with source annotation parses rules array from settings.json
Plugins extracted from settings parses plugin entries from settings.json
Malformed settings file returns parse error with message returns error result for invalid content
Missing hooks section returns empty hooks list returns empty hooks array when hooks key is absent
Missing MCP servers section returns empty servers list returns empty mcpServers array when mcpServers key is absent
Environment tab registration SUB_TAB_LABELS includes 'Environment' for env tab
Environment tab registration SUB_TAB_ICONS includes an icon for env tab
Environment list panel renders sorted env vars displays env vars sorted alphabetically by key
Environment list header shows count and scope renders scope badge on each env var row
Environment empty state shows guidance when no env vars configured
Environment detail panel calls onSelect with env tag when env var row is clicked
Environment detail panel switching selection updates detail to the newly selected variable
Environment detail panel short boolean-like value displayed with full detail context
Environment detail panel renders env var detail with key, value, scope, and source
settingsParser properties malformed JSON always returns error tag
settingsParser properties valid JSON object never throws and returns parsed or error
settingsParser properties empty object returns parsed with all empty arrays
settingsParser properties hook count equals total entries across all event types
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings filters out all non-string values
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings results are always sorted alphabetically by key
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings scope matches the scope parameter passed to parseSettings
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings sets source to settings.json for each entry
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings sets filePath to empty string (populated by caller)
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings returns empty array when env block is an array
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings returns empty array when env block is a string
User views environment variables from settings parses settings with 5 OTEL env vars into 5 sorted entries
User views environment variables from settings attributes user scope for user-level settings
User views environment variables from settings attributes project scope for project-level settings
User views environment variables from settings produces empty array when env block is missing
User views environment variables from settings produces empty array when env block is empty object
User views environment variables from settings filters out non-string values (objects, numbers, arrays)
User views environment variables from settings handles single env var
User views environment variables from settings preserves special characters in values
User views environment variables from settings includes empty string values
User views environment variables from settings parses mixed env vars sorted correctly
User views environment variables from settings env vars are always sorted alphabetically and count matches entries
User sees all configuration categories from .claude/ directory aggregates agents, hooks, skills, rules, MCP servers, and docs into unified view
Missing subdirectories produce empty lists, not errors returns empty agents and skills when no agent or command files exist
Both user and project scopes aggregated with source annotations combines agents from user and project scopes with scope annotation
Doc files passed through with scope and path includes CLAUDE.md files with their source paths and scopes
Agents from both scopes combined in aggregated result merges user-level and project-level agent lists
Per-file read errors isolated from successful reads returns successful agents alongside errors for unreadable files
Settings parse error does not break agent and skill lists returns agents and skills even when settings.json is malformed
Completely empty config produces all-empty aggregated result returns empty lists for all categories when .claude/ has no files
Read errors carry scope annotation preserves the scope on error entries for source attribution
Env vars from settings are aggregated with filePath annotation aggregates 5 OTEL env vars from settings with filePath annotation
Env vars from settings are aggregated with filePath annotation produces empty envVars when settings is null
Env vars from settings are aggregated with filePath annotation produces empty envVars when settings JSON is malformed
